_comment: Deterministic recipe for the golden chain fixture. The SINGLE SOURCE of the fixture's inputs: scripts/gen-golden-chain.mjs builds it and writes golden-chain.csv / golden-chain.json; golden-chain.test.ts rebuilds it and asserts byte-identical reproduction. All values are fixed (no random UUID, no timestamps) so the resulting hashes are reproducible forever and across PostgreSQL versions. Payloads are JS-safe (no >2^53 ints / lossy decimals — those exotic renderings are covered by jsonb-vectors.json); here the point is a representative real recording path: payloads, a no-payload event, key reordering, CSV-hostile text, and an empty checkpoint.
